forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely between 7am and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 80, with temperatures falling to around 78 in the afternoon. nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
